title: RapidMeta Hematology | Rusfertide (Hepcidin Mimetic) in Polycythemia Vera v1.0

pico.pop: Adults with polycythemia vera (WHO criteria) requiring frequent phlebotomy (>=3 phlebotomies in the 28 weeks before randomization), with or without cytoreductive therapy
pico.int: Rusfertide subcutaneous weekly (hepcidin mimetic peptide; dose-titrated)
pico.comp: Placebo on top of standard care (phlebotomy and/or cytoreduction)
pico.out: Clinical response at week 32 (composite: hematocrit control without phlebotomy in weeks 20-32 + >=35% reduction in phlebotomy events vs pre-randomization period; primary)
pico.subgroup: Use of cytoreductive therapy at entry, JAK2-V617F allele burden, prior thrombosis

real_data_entries.name: VERIFY
real_data_entries.group: Phlebotomy-dependent polycythemia vera, rusfertide SC weekly vs placebo (clinical response at wk 32 primary)

allOutcomes.title: Clinical response at week 32 (RR vs placebo; primary)
Mean number of phlebotomies in weeks 20-32 (rusfertide minus placebo, MD; secondary)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Hoffman R et al. NEJM 2024 (VERIFY phase 3 rusfertide).
